chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَا يَصْلُحُ الْبَيْعُ إِلَّا بِمِكْيَالِ الْبَلَدِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 78 – The selling is not correct except my a measurement of the city

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/189)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/189)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَوْمٍ يُصَغِّرُونَ الْقُفْزَانَ يَبِيعُونَ بِهَا قَالَ أُولَئِكَ الَّذِينَ يَبْخَسُونَ النَّاسَ أَشْيَاءَهُمْ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Khalid Al Barqy, from Sa’ad,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a people who are making their measuring devices smaller, selling by these. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘They are those who are undervaluing the things of the people’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn Khalid al-Barqiy from Sa‘d ibn Sa‘d who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a people who make al-Qufzan (measuring devices) small with which they sell. He (the Imam) said, ‘They are of the people who cause losses in their belongings.’”
